clusters.competency_definition: The ability to identify and describe one's own emotions, characteristics, and needs while maintaining positive self-identity.
A sustained orientation toward recognizing and regulating one's emotions while demonstrating independence and confidence in meeting personal needs.
A sustained orientation toward understanding others' emotions and characteristics while responding with empathy and care.
A sustained orientation toward building and maintaining positive relationships through effective communication and prosocial behavior.
The ability to use problem-solving strategies and community knowledge to make safe and responsible choices.
The ability to recognize and understand one's emotions, strengths, interests, and need for support.
The ability to regulate emotions, set goals, communicate needs, and demonstrate initiative in personal choices.
The ability to understand others' perspectives, recognize fairness, and demonstrate care and respect for others.
A sustained orientation toward building positive relationships through communication, collaboration, and emotional regulation.
The ability to solve problems, reflect on actions, and understand community support systems and safety rules.
The ability to recognize and understand one's emotions, strengths, interests, and personal needs.
The ability to regulate emotions, set goals, and demonstrate persistence in overcoming challenges.
The ability to understand others' emotions, appreciate diversity, and demonstrate empathy and gratitude.
The ability to build and maintain positive relationships through effective communication and collaboration.
The ability to make thoughtful choices by analyzing problems and considering consequences for self and community.
The ability to recognize and understand one's emotions, strengths, and mindset in various situations.
The ability to regulate emotions, set goals, and demonstrate perseverance when facing challenges.
The ability to understand and appreciate diversity, demonstrate empathy, and identify community needs.
The ability to build positive relationships, communicate effectively, and resolve conflicts constructively.
The ability to make thoughtful choices by evaluating options, consequences, and personal impact on others.
The ability to recognize and understand one's emotions, strengths, values, and their impact on thoughts and behaviors.
The ability to regulate emotions, cope with stress, set goals, and reframe challenges as learning opportunities.
The ability to understand diverse perspectives, empathize with others, and contribute positively to community well-being.
The ability to build positive relationships, collaborate effectively, communicate respectfully, and resolve conflicts constructively.
The ability to make thoughtful choices by gathering evidence, considering consequences, and reflecting on impacts.
The ability to recognize emotions, identify personal strengths, and reframe challenges into opportunities for growth.
The ability to regulate emotions, develop goal-oriented plans, and demonstrate perseverance and self-advocacy.
A sustained orientation toward understanding diverse perspectives, recognizing injustice, and contributing to community well-being.
The ability to build positive relationships, collaborate effectively, and resolve conflicts responsibly.
The ability to make thoughtful decisions by considering consequences, gathering evidence, and applying ethical reasoning.
